mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_worship
AND (title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR preacher LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT worship_id, title, preacher, scripture, worship_date, worship_type, video_url, description, status, reg_date FROM erp_worship WHERE video_url IS NOT NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND (title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR preacher LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') ORDER BY worship_date DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_worship WHERE video_url IS NOT NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND (title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR preacher LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_attendance
AND member_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_worship_order
AND worship_id = #{worshipId}
